title: Gavin (disambiguation)
content:
'''Gavin''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Gavin Sal]]''', [[fathier]] [[jockey]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Bowman Gavin]]''', a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]]
*'''[[Gavin Bresch]]''', a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]
*'''[[Gavin Darklighter]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]
*'''[[Gavin Zmitt]]''', an agent of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]

==[[In-universe|Out of universe]]==
*'''[[Gavin Bocquet]]''', the real-life production designer
*'''[[Gavin Bryars]]''', a composer for ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]''
*'''[[Gavin Hignight]]''', a screenwriter for ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]''
*'''[[Gavin Spokes]]''', an actor who played [[Tenek]] in ''[[Star Wars: Andor]]''
*'''[[Weston Gavin]]''', an actor who portrayed [[Vlex Onopin]] in ''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]''

{{Disambig}}
